extraction.one_line_summary: O'CONNOR Ben won solo by 5:07 after attacking leaders on final climb, while Israel Startup Nation controlled tempo from kilometer zero specifically for Woods polka dot points.
tactical_patterns: Israel Startup Nation controlled from km 0 sacrificing team resources solely to position Woods for KOM points collection.
O'Connor attacked the breakaway leaders at 5km-to-go mark on final climb, winning by exceptional 5:07 margin.
Quick-Step left two riders with dropped Cavendish to ensure time cut survival, revealing team commitment threshold.
Quintana specifically targeted high-altitude KOM points rather than stage wins, suggesting altitude-based jersey strategy.

rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: positive: Attacked breakaway companions on final climb with enough power to win by 5:07, unusual gap for breakaway-vs-breakaway
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: neutral: Israel committed full team resources from km 0 for KOM points but Quintana still outscored him
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: Altitude specialist strength showed at high elevation, targeted KOM points not stage win which suggests calculated jersey campaign
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: neutral: Required two Quick-Step domestiques sacrificed to make time cut, revealing team's cutoff anxiety threshold
